CustomField.formula: IF(NATT_Is_Base_Unit__c, SBQQ__Quote__r.NATT_Configured_Unit_Code__c, IF(OR(SBQQ__ProductCode__c = 'Special Request', SBQQ__ProductName__c = 'Special Paint'), NATT_Special_Request_Notes__c, IF(NOT(ISBLANK(NATT_P_N__c)), NATT_P_N__c, SBQQ__ProductCode__c)))
CustomField.label: Part Information
